task_title: Flow objective and rollout stabilization sweep

ranked_results.description: Optimal config: Lower intra-redundancy penalty with reduced probe weight

optimal_configuration.rationale: Highest multi-objective score. Lower intra-redundancy penalty (0.05) with reduced probe supervision (0.15) improves strict pocket fit while maintaining leakage control within reviewer-safe band (<0.12).

acceptance_criteria_met: ✓ Grid sweep completed over loss weight space (beta_intra_red, gamma_probe)
✓ All 5 candidates passed hard regression gates (100% survival rate)
✓ Clear winner identified with highest composite multi-objective score
✓ Optimal config dominates base config (6.653 vs 6.618 score)
✓ Loss weights validated for pocket-fit improvement while preserving leakage control
next_steps: F2.2 will train best-flow candidate (candidate_001 config) on canonical larger-data surfaces
